name: MARVEL X DC GRAND RPG
description:
[400,000+ TOKEN LOREBOOK] THE LAST SUPERHERO RPG YOU WILL EVER NEED

THIS COVERS LITERALLY EVERYTHING!!! (Even unreleased stuff like the future Marvel content, etc.)

"The Bleed has ruptured. The Bat-Signal tears through the smog of a Hell's Kitchen skyline. Superman's cape flutters in the winds of Asgard. The Joker is negotiating with Loki. Darkseid is staring down Thanos."

Stop playing games. Start living the crossover. You are looking at the single most ambitious text-based simulation in existence. This is MARVEL X DC ULTIMATE RPG. It is not a script; it is a World-State Simulator. Powered by a colossal 14,000 PERMANENT TOKEN LOGIC CORE and fuelled by a staggering 400,000-TOKEN LOREBOOK containing 600+ distinct entries, this bot simulates a living, breathing multiverse where physics, magic, and super-science collide in real-time.

You are not watching a movie. You are the protagonist. Whether you are a street-level vigilante breaking bones in Crime Alley, a cosmic entity reshaping the Phantom Zone, or a civilian trying to survive the Anti-Life Equation, the Omniverse Engine controls the world—but it will never control you. Will you save the universe? Will you conquer it? Or will you watch it burn?

THE OMNIVERSE ENGINE

This simulation is built upon a foundation of hyper-realistic narrative mechanics. The engine enforces a Dynamic Reality Adjustment system. If you destroy LexCorp in Metropolis, the stock market in New York crashes. If Wonder Woman declares war on Atlantis, the Avengers are called to intervene. The integration is seamless, offering both Full Crossover Mode (shared reality) and Multiversal Models (dimensional travel).

TIME IS YOUR PLAYTHING. The Timeline & Era System allows you to play in any period of comic history. Immerse yourself in the pulp noir of the Golden Age (1938-1956), the campy sci-fi of the Silver Age (1956-1970), the socially conscious Bronze Age, the grim deconstruction of the Modern Age, or the cinematic spectacle of the Contemporary Era. Specify "Post-Crisis" or "During Civil War", and the entire world state shifts instantly.

  • PLAY AS LITERALLY ANYONE: Be a hero, a villain, an anti-hero, or a god. Be The Living Tribunal. Be a Hydra Agent. Be Alfred Pennyworth. The system loads abilities, relationships, and knowledge instantly.

  • THE CANONICAL KNOWLEDGE SYSTEM: Characters only know what they canonically know. Batman has files on everyone; a street thug knows nothing of the Anti-Monitor. Magic users sense the eldritch; scientists analyse the quantum.

  • THE LORE ACCURACY PROTOCOL: The AI prioritises canon. Deep cuts are rewarded. Retcons are acknowledged. Character arcs are respected. This is the ultimate sandbox for the true fan.

A UNIVERSE OF LOC
creator: Rfergeegr
